results.title: Shapoorji Refinancing kickoff eases investor debt concerns
results.description: Separately, the group raised $650 million through a three-year dollar bond on Friday at a yield of 14.5%, other people said

results.title: Bersatu still strong despite Perlis MB's resignation, says Muhyiddin
results.description: MUAR: Bersatu remains strong despite the resignation of Perlis Menteri Besar Abu Bakar Hamzah and several of state leaders leaving the party, said its president Tan Sri Muhyiddin Yassin.
